I14Y 0.2.0
  • Home
  • Reference
  • Articles
  • News

Package index

Search

Search across the I14Y catalog.

i14y_search()
Search the I14Y catalog
i14y_search_catalog()
Search the catalog for datasets, data services and public services.
i14y_search_codelist()
Search entries within a codelist concept
i14y_search_concept()
Search for a Concept Summary
i14y_export_codelist_search()
Export search results from a codelist concept

Catalogs

List and retrieve catalogs and catalog records.

i14y_list_catalogs()
List catalogs
i14y_get_catalog()
Get a catalog by ID
i14y_get_catalog_dcat()
Export the DCAT representation of a catalog
i14y_get_catalog_record()
Get a single record of a catalog
i14y_get_catalog_records()
List records of a catalog

Datasets

List and retrieve datasets and their structures.

i14y_list_datasets()
List datasets
i14y_get_dataset()
Get dataset metadata by ID
i14y_get_dataset_structure()
Export the data structure of a dataset

Concepts

List and retrieve concepts.

i14y_list_concepts()
List concepts
i14y_get_concept()
Get a concept by ID
i14y_get_concept_export()
Get the JSON export of a concept

Codelists

Retrieve codelists.

i14y_get_codelist()
Export a codelist

Mapping tables

List and retrieve mapping tables and their relations.

i14y_list_mappingtables()
List mapping tables
i14y_get_mappingtable()
Get a mapping table by ID
i14y_get_mappingtable_relations()
Export the relations of a mapping table

Data services

List and retrieve data services.

i14y_list_dataservices()
List data services
i14y_get_dataservice()
Get a data service by ID

Public services

List and retrieve public services.

i14y_list_publicservices()
List public services
i14y_get_publicservice()
Get a public service by ID
